Live 105 Top 105.3 Songs of 1991

  1. Nirvana - Smells Like Teen Spirit
  2. R.E.M. - Losing My Religion
  3. U2 - One
  4. Pearl Jam - Alive
  5. The Cure - Close to Me (Closer Mix)
  6. New Order - Regret
  7. Red Hot Chili Peppers - Give It Away
  8. Soundgarden - Rusty Cage
  9. Jane's Addiction - Been Caught Stealing
  10. Depeche Mode - Personal Jesus
